h0c96c31bg8737g42ecga163g3d6618cfedb9: Don't tell me - another dream. And this one was more... intense.

haedf73d0ge108g44d8ga747g75d117b6a0dc: And yet blame him, you should. He invites the ghaik into our minds for a veritable feast.

h3980b43cg1b67g4a47g9ffegcf98dae2b75c: It cost us one bad dream to alter someone's mind. I'd say that's a bargain.

h347b5293g1383g4c34g940eg44cfdcfd8d39: Power is a treacherous thing. Sometimes it makes you betray yourself.
